result: [{"type":"text","text":"MCP error -32603: Failed to create table ZTAB5: Failed to create table ZTAB5: <?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?><exc:exception xmlns:exc=\"http://www.sap.com/abapxml/types/communicationframework\"><namespace id=\"com.sap.adt\"/><type id=\"ExceptionResourceNoAccess\"/><message lang=\"EN\">You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)</message><localizedMessage lang=\"EN\">You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)</localizedMessage><properties><entry key=\"LONGTEXT\"><HTML><HEAD><TITLE>Conversion of SAPscript Text EU519 to HTML</TITLE><META http-equiv=\"Content-Type\" content=\"text/html; charset=utf-8\"></HEAD><BODY><P><STRONG>You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)</STRONG></P><P>Message No. EU519</P><P><STRONG>Diagnosis</STRONG></P><P>You attempted to change a workbench object without the necessary change authorization.</P><P><STRONG>System Response</STRONG></P><P>The system does not let you change the object. The system generally shows you the object in display mode.</P><P><STRONG>Procedure</STRONG></P><P>The system uses authorization object S_ABPLNGVS for objects in the workbench. You do not have authorization for the authorizationobject S_ABPLNGVS in your user master record.<BR>If necessary, ask your system administrator to give you the appropriate change authorization (possibly restricted to a specific package).</P></BODY></HTML></entry><entry key=\"T100KEY-ID\">EU</entry><entry key=\"T100KEY-NO\">519</entry><entry key=\"T100KEY-V1\">S_ABPLNGVS</entry></properties></exc:exception>"}]
